raw_output:
PR #7 correctness review (Claude, Fable 5, fresh-context, head 7a4c/branch fix/coverage-floor-precision).

Reproduced the root cause bit-for-bit with a 3-statement uncovered probe (198/201 = 98.51%): main config reports 99%, prints pytest-cov's FAIL message, exits 0; PR config reports 98.51%, exits 1. Mechanics confirmed in installed sources: coverage/results.py::should_fail_under returns round(total, precision) < fail_under; pytest-cov's exit path uses should_fail_under while its terminal message independently compares the raw value — explaining FAIL-with-exit-0. CI runs the identical invocation with no overriding config. precision affects only display formatting and the fail_under comparison; integer fail_under triggers no config warning. Clean tree: 58 passed, 100.00%, exit 0. Plan touch-set matches the diff.

Findings: F1 (nit) "±0.5-point blind spot" loose — window was one-sided, (98.5, 99.0), and exactly 98.5 fails under round-half-even. F2 (nit) precision=2 narrows the window to 0.005 points ([98.995, 99.0) passes) rather than eliminating it; unreachable at current granularity; the rounding-free alternative is coverage's fail_under=100 special case, declined by documented policy. Overall: correct and minimal; no blocking findings.

--- Post-review delta note (orchestrator, attested at final head 57bb1f2) ---
Single-round battery on 1c-file diff converged with zero blocking findings.
Post-review commit 57bb1f2 applies the validated wording fixes: ADR 0005 now
records the one-sidedness of the original blind spot, the residual
[98.995, 99.0) rounding window at precision 2 (three-leg convergence), and
the declined rounding-free fail_under=100 alternative. Doc-only delta;
verification: clean tree 58 tests / 100.00% / exit 0, breach case exits 1.

findings.summary: '±0.5-point blind spot' wording loose; window was one-sided
findings.reason: ADR reworded to '0.5-point blind spot below the floor'.

findings.summary: precision=2 narrows the rounding window to [98.995, 99.0) rather than eliminating it
findings.reason: Residual window, current-size unreachability, and declined fail_under=100 alternative recorded in ADR 0005. Same substance as claude-sec S1 / codex-sec Z1.
